keywords.job: I am a mystic of the suns. I provide protective blessings for those in need.
keywords.name: My name is Edala, pilgrim.
keywords.mystic: We mystics are philosophers and healers.
keywords.cenath: I don't consider me a member of any caste, and I don't want to talk about this matter.
keywords.kuridai: I don't consider me a member of any caste, and I don't want to talk about this matter.
keywords.deraisim: I don't consider me a member of any caste, and I don't want to talk about this matter.
keywords.abdaisim: I don't consider me a member of any caste, and I don't want to talk about this matter.
keywords.teshial: I don't consider me a member of any caste, and I don't want to talk about this matter.
keywords.crunor: Crunor is great in his beauty.
keywords.priyla: The daughter of the stars is my patron.
keywords.excalibug: It is true that this weapon brings great power. But you should not look for power. It is wisdom you really need.
keywords.news: News? I don't care about news.
keywords.heal$: You aren't looking that bad. Sorry, I can't help you. But if you are looking for additional protection you should go on the pilgrimage of ashes.
keywords.pilgrimage: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.ashes: Whenever you receive a lethal wound your lifeforce is damaged. With every single of the five blessings you have this damage will be reduced.
keywords.spiritual: You may receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflowertemple south of Thais.
keywords.shielding: You may receive the spiritual shielding in the whiteflowertemple south of Thais.
keywords.sacred: Just ask my about the blessing you are interested in.
keywords.places: Just ask my about the blessing you are interested in.
keywords.spark: The spark of the phoenix will be given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.phoenix: The spark of the phoenix will be given to you by the dwarven priests of earth and fire in Kazordoon.
keywords.embrace: The druids north of Carlin will provide you with the embrace of tibia.
keywords.fire: Do you wish to receive the blessing of the two suns? It will cost you 10.000 gold, pilgrim.
keywords.suns: Do you wish to receive the blessing of the two suns? It will cost you 10.000 gold, pilgrim.
keywords.wisdom: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.solitude: Talk to the hermit Eremo on the isle of Cormaya about this blessing.
keywords.blessing: I can sell you the Fire of the Suns for %d gold. Are you interested?
keywords.blessings: I can sell you the Fire of the Suns for %d gold. Are you interested?

texts: I am a mystic of the suns. I provide protective blessings for those in need.

entries.response: Oh. You do not have enough money.
Kneel down and receive the warmth of sunfire, pilgrim.
The Fire of the Suns is yours. May it protect you in your darkest hour.
I am sorry, but you do not have enough gold.
